revision.comment: Protected "[[Module:Lang/Configuration]]": [[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|High-risk template or module]]: 66337 transclusions ([[User:MusikBot II/TemplateProtector|more info]]) ([Edit=Require template editor access] (indefinite) [Move=Require template editor access] (indefinite))
Trappist the monk moved page [[Module:Lang/Configuration]] to [[Module:Lang/configuration]] without leaving a redirect: subpage capitalization consistent with other [[Module:Lang]] subpages;

Changed protection settings for "[[Module:Lang/configuration]]": Match protection with parent and already cascade-protected via the Main Page anyway ([Edit=Require administrator access] (indefinite) [Move=Require administrator access] (indefinite))

Changed protection settings for "[[Module:Lang/configuration]]": base protection level of [[Module:Lang]] is template editor; reduce this module's protection to match Module:Lang ([Edit=Require template editor access] (indefinite) [Move=Require template editor access] (indefinite))
10 revisions imported from [[:wikipedia:Module:Lang/configuration]]: Import just to get the source
Reverted edits by [[Special:Contributions/Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) to last revision by [[User:en>Trappist the monk|en>Trappist the monk]]
1 revision imported: I hope this manages to go through
1 revision imported: chat is this real
1 revision imported: lets hope this fixes it since the qq=draft was showing up
Bot: Reverting edits from past 90 minutes
imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
